introSection: Wild Mouse is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Dorney Park & Wildwater Kingdom in Allentown, Pennsylvania, USA. Located south of Hydra The Revenge (Hercules prior to 2003), it is a standard Wilde Maus Classic from Maurer Rides. The attraction opened on May 6, 2000.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Sharp turns, steep drops and small cars characterize the wild mouse coaster.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The cars are painted as mice who are running around the ride. The mice are painted grey but mostly yellow. Wild Mouse also features cars painted as cats being part of the ride, causing it to become a cat and mouse chase. The cats are painted orange and yellow.

fullText:
Wild Mouse is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Dorney Park & Wildwater Kingdom in Allentown, Pennsylvania, USA. Located south of Hydra The Revenge (Hercules prior to 2003), it is a standard Wilde Maus Classic from Maurer Rides. The attraction opened on May 6, 2000.

Sharp turns, steep drops and small cars characterize the wild mouse coaster.

Orange track and Blue supports.

The cars are painted as mice who are running around the ride. The mice are painted grey but mostly yellow. Wild Mouse also features cars painted as cats being part of the ride, causing it to become a cat and mouse chase. The cats are painted orange and yellow.
